prompt: Position comparison: the button can enter after earlier seats are out. Compared with UTG first-in, classify the button range width.
why_v1: Wider means the button can include more hands because fewer players remain behind.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The button range is wider because late position can include more hands than UTG.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The button range is wider because fewer players remain behind, so more hands can fit the range.
